item.description:
# AI Usage Battery 0.2.5 (Build 9)
This hotfix keeps the production menu-bar item visible on Macs that previously stored AIUsageBattery as hidden in System Settings.
## Changes
- Stops registering the AppKit `NSStatusItem` as removable, so macOS does not apply the old menu-bar visibility toggle to the production bundle. - Keeps clearing legacy `NSStatusItem Visible...` preferences on launch and synchronizes the preference write immediately.
## Verification
- Removed the stale production `NSStatusItem VisibleCC Item-0 = 0` preference locally and confirmed it did not return after relaunch. - Swift test suite passes. - Debug Xcode build passes.
